arts.ttl: Dortmund coach Sahin open to exit if he is the problem
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund coach Nuri Sahin said he still felt the trust from his players but would talk to club bosses after Tuesday's shock 2-1 loss to Bologna in the Champions League that stretched their losing run to four games across all competitions. Sahin, who took over this season, had already been under mounting pressure going into the game with his team having lost all three of their Bundesliga matches in 2025.

arts.ttl: Is Sahin on the brink after another Dortmund defeat?
arts.sum: After just seven months in charge of the Bundesliga club, is Nuri Sahin already on the brink?

arts.ttl: Dortmund bosses to discuss coach Nuri Sahin's future after yet another defeat
arts.sum: Last season, Guirassy scored 28 goals in 28 Bundesliga games for Stuttgart. Now we’ve won once in nine games,” said Ricken, who declined to say the club still had faith in Sahin to turn it around.

arts.ttl: MOTM Poll: Dortmund Grant Bologna Their First Ever UCL Win
arts.sum: He also had some pretty scary moments in build-up where he let the ball slip a couple of times, but I do believe Bologna would have had another goal if not for Schlotterbeck’s performance tonight. BVB just can’t seem to win games at the moment, and the trend continued after a very anonymous performance in the Emilia-Romagnan capital.

arts.ttl: Dortmund chief leaves Sahin's future as Dortmund coach open after Bologna loss
arts.sum: After Tuesday's Champions League defeat to Bologna, Borussia Dortmund's sporting director Lars Ricken wouldn't guarantee that Nuri Sahin will remain in charge.
